hero.taglineLead: Digital strategy for teams that need

vision.line: I read the project from multiple angles: business, user, content, channels.

strategy.line: Not what can be done: what to do, why, and in what order.

ideas.line: Concrete directions, not slides that stay in a drawer.

workflow.line: Roadmap, priorities, ownership. A plan the team can execute.

analisi.desc: I start from data and context: market, users, numbers, and what already exists.

diagnosi.desc: I isolate the real problem, not the symptoms: where value leaks, and why.

strategia.desc: I set direction and priorities: what to do, in what order, toward which goals.

piano.desc: I turn strategy into an operational roadmap: tasks, ownership, timing.

affiancamento.desc: I stay alongside the team through execution, until the plan delivers results.

polly.title: MyPolly
polly.result: Peaks of ~80 orders a day at moments of highest traction.

biodiversa.title: App Biodiversa
biodiversa.result: Biodiversity data turned into concrete actions for the people using the app.

chisono.p1: I’ve worked across communication, e-commerce, advertising, funnels, community and digital products. That lets me read a project from multiple angles — and quickly see where things get tangled and where to step in.
chisono.p2: I don’t have to run every task myself: I help companies and teams decide better, build a clear plan, and guide its execution with method.

meta.title: About — Valentina Inchingolo
meta.description: Behind Valeink: the method, the lenses I read a project through, and the path of Valentina Inchingolo, digital strategy consultant across Brescia, Milan and remote.

bio.p1: I’ve moved through communication, e-commerce, advertising, funnels, community and digital product. It’s not a list of jobs: it’s why I can read a whole project without stopping at my own piece.
bio.p2: Valeink has always been my nickname — and it became the name of this work: stepping into other people’s projects, bringing order, and leaving behind a direction that lasts.
bio.claimLead: My value isn’t “doing”. It’s helping you choose
bio.claimTail: to do, why, and in what order.
